text:
| Image sequence                                                                | A series of images taken quickly in succession. The RTVision.t system       |
|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| creates image sequences at a frequency of approx. 200 Hz from images          |                                                                             |
| taken every 5 ms. This image sequence of the glue bead acts as the basis      |                                                                             |
| for all subsequent parameterizations and tests of the RTVision.t system.      |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| Client application                                                            | A client application is a computer program that assigns tasks to a          |
| server application or controls these.                                         |                                                                             |
| The client can be installed on the same computer or on a different            |                                                                             |
| computer.                                                                     |                                                                             |
| Frame                                                                         | An image within a video taken by the camera                                 |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| Gray level                                                                    | corresponds to the brightness of a pixel. Most cameras can identify 256     |
| different levels of brightness.  Black equals 0 or 0%; white equals 255 or    |                                                                             |
| 100%                                                                          |                                                                             |
| Gray level                                                                    |                                                                             |
| difference                                                                    |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| This is the difference between the gray levels of adjacent pixels. The gray   |                                                                             |
| level difference is independent of the absolute brightness to a large extent. |                                                                             |
| The gray level difference is the most important property of adjacent pixels   |                                                                             |
| for forming the contour model. Corresponds to contrast.                       |                                                                             |
| Inspection                                                                    | Contains the areas for the different distances of the bead path. Every area |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| is parameterized differently and can be adapted precisely to the test         |                                                                             |
| conditions based on reference, exposure and contour. Determination of         |                                                                             |
| inspection result as "OK" or "NOK"                                            |                                                                             |
| Several inspections can be carried out for each product. A variety of         |                                                                             |
| parameterized areas exist accordingly for each inspection.                    |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| OK                                                                            | No problem. The inspection has been completed and evaluated as error-       |
| free. Also referred to as OK.                                                 |                                                                             |
| Calibration                                                                   | Stipulates the number of pixels per length unit, e.g. pixel/mm. Required    |
| work step in the hardware module in order to be able to use the unit "mm"     |                                                                             |
| in the other parameters. In the case of RTVision.t, the hardware is already   |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| calibrated ex works since the operating conditions, such as search radius     |                                                                             |
| and working distance, are known in advance.                                   |                                                                             |
| Glue seam / seam                                                              | Referred to also as a glue path or glue bead, or also inspection track.     |
| Adhesive bead                                                                 | Referred to also as a glue bead or inspection track.                        |
| Inspection track                                                                 | Referred to also as a glue bead or adhesive bead.                           |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Contrast                                                                         | This is the difference between the gray levels of adjacent pixels. The gray |
| level difference is independent of the absolute brightness to a large extent.    |                                                                             |
| The gray level difference is the most important property of adjacent pixels      |                                                                             |
| for forming the contour model. The contrast corresponds to the gray level        |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| difference.                                                                      |                                                                             |
| Contour                                                                          | A contour is a line or area that can be detected in the image, which is     |
| formed by gray level differences. A contour is only used for advanced            |                                                                             |
| analysis if the gray level differences are above the contour threshold. Edge     |                                                                             |
| transitions are the meaningful part of the inspection in this respect.           |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| Contour model                                                                    | The contour model of an image only contains gray level differences          |
| (contours) that exceed a specific size - the contour threshold. All contour      |                                                                             |
| analyses are performed on the basis of the contour model.                        |                                                                             |
| NOK                                                                              | Not OK. The inspection has been completed and errors were detected.         |
| Also referred to as NOK.                                                         |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| Orthogonal                                                                       | Right angled, or two levels are vertical to each other                      |
| Parameter set                                                                    | Contains all parameters or settings that are necessary for inspecting a     |
| product and are defined.                                                         |                                                                             |
| A parameter set is selected in the Automatic module with its name - the          |                                                                             |
| product name. The product ID is used to activate or open it.                     |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| Product                                                                          | The product describes a parameter set, the settings of which enable an      |
| inspection of the product. The product can be selected in the Automatic          |                                                                             |
| module (server). The product description (the product name) is defined in        |                                                                             |
| the Parameter module. An ID has to be assigned in order to open the              |                                                                             |
| product via the higher-level controller.                                         |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| RGB sensor                                                                       | Also known as RTVision.t V4 Sensor©; it is operated in accordance with      |
| the application system, material (substrate) and sealant with three different    |                                                                             |
| colors: red/green or blue. It is controlled via the LED light controller (strobe |                                                                             |
| controller) with a total current of 100 - 5000mA depending on whether            |                                                                             |
| scattered or polarized light (filter type) is used.                              |                                                                             |
hierarchy_path: QUISS 2D RTV.t V4.8_Operation_Manual_EN > Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8 > 9.5 Glossary

chapter: Inline Glue And Sealant Application Inspection System Rtvision.T - V. 4.8
text:
| Server application                                                               | A server application is a computer program that performs tasks as           |
| requested by the client application and outputs messages in this respect.        |                                                                             |
| Tolerance                                                                        | Tolerance is an accepted deviation of the actual value from a reference     |
| value.                                                                           |                                                                             |
